rounds: The 6am necklace purchase without deliberating? Joy police weren't even in the building for that one — Matt got it clean. Painted toes on a Saturday, chemist aisle comparing nail shades without flinching — two more wins they couldn't touch. But the bracelet is still on the Wish List, not on his wrist, and the Demand hasn't been revealed yet. That round's still open.
pattern: They're quietest when he moves fast and alone — loudest when there's time to think about it.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
